name: Flávia Benson

handling.tone: Brazilian-Anglo household. Organized — gave specific call time. Andre missed scheduled 10 AM Apr 24 by 20 min. Recovery requires precision: propose another exact slot, not 'whenever works.'
handling.voice_adjustments: Andre voice: brief, exact times. Don't over-apologize, don't dwell. Be on-time the next time.
handling.context: Crisp Chat inbound Apr 23. Locked 10 AM Apr 24 call. Andre missed by 20 min, called at 10:20, has been chasing recovery contact since. Today (Apr 25) — Andre called again, no connect. 5 weeks to graduation event.

context_anchors: May 31, 2026 graduation — 5 weeks out, HIGH urgency
Locked 10 AM Apr 24 call — Andre missed by 20 min
Open task: 'Change name of lead once you find what it is'

lead.next_move: Recovery message offering exact 15-min slots (9 AM, 11 AM, 1 PM, 3 PM tomorrow) OR text top question

enrichment.identity_notes: Flávia with accent = Brazilian/Portuguese background. Benson = Anglo. Brazilian woman married to/partnered with English-Anglo heritage — common pattern in Greater Boston Brazilian community. Organized: Crisp-chatted, gave clear call time.
win_angles: Honor her time precision — match her energy
5 weeks to event = real pressure, losing time per missed connection
Brazilian-Anglo cultural bridge — Brazilian for family side, American for friends
Graduation = emotional milestone but smaller stakes than wedding
40 + Boston backyard = drop-off / appetizer-heavy / casual buffet
nepq_openers: Recovery: 'Hey Flávia — totally my bad on missing 10 AM yesterday. To make it up: pick a 15-min window in the next 24h and I'll be on the dot this time. 9 AM, 11 AM, 1 PM, or 3 PM tomorrow. Or text your top question right now.'
Frame: 'Whose graduation? Family-formal, friends-casual, or somewhere in between?'
Anchor: 'For 40 guests: drop-off ($X), buffet with light service ($Y), full hosted ($Z). What does the day look like — host while it's happening, or hand off?'
open_gaps: Whose graduation (her child, herself, family, friend)
Cuisine direction — Brazilian vs American vs blended
enrichment.strategic_note: Hinges on getting one good 15-min call done. She showed organized when she scheduled. Will likely be patient with one specific reschedule attempt. Miss again or follow up vaguely = write us off. Be precise, on-time, helpful in call. Small but real opportunity well within wheelhouse.

comms.summary: 'I can do a call tomorrow at 10 am if that works for you.'
Andre 20 min late, apologized, indicated availability all day

notes: Andre missed scheduled 10 AM — recovery requires precision
If miss again, she'll go elsewhere
